label: Landing outcome
description: Defines a negative outcome the gravship controller may apply when a gravship lands with a failed quality roll.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative probability weight used when randomly selecting among eligible landing outcomes.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Translated title shown in the letter pane when this outcome is triggered. Marked [MustTranslate] -- a keyed translation entry is expected.

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Translated body text shown in the letter pane. Supports grammar tokens {GRAVSHIP}, {PILOT_nameDef}, and {COPILOT_nameDef}. Marked [MustTranslate].

letterDef.label: Letter def
letterDef.description: Letter type that controls the icon and severity displayed when this outcome fires. Typically NegativeEvent.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: Fully-qualified C# class name of the concrete LandingOutcomeWorker subclass that implements this outcome's effects.

basic-landing-outcome.label: Basic landing outcome
basic-landing-outcome.description: Minimal landing outcome with a worker class, letter, and default weight.
